name: Bonbon
short_description: A thirty-minute childhood-horror walking-sim about toys and a giant rat. A short, single-sitting experience.
detailed_description:
Bonbon is a thirty-minute long, first-person domestic horror narrative about childhood events you are too young to understand.

Playing as a young toddler, walking and carrying objects will be difficult. You will drop things, and you will fall over. Since your parents aren't there to pick you up, you'll be spending time with a large, overbearing and ambiguous visitor... a monstrous, hungry rat named Bonbon.

You can play with mouse and keyboard, or a 360-style gamepad.

Please note that the game is a short, single-sitting experience. It will take between 20 to 40 minutes to complete, depending on how you play.
